message:
feat(fnp): port fmax/fmin from NumPy passthrough to native Rust

- Add pub fn fmax() and fmin() to fnp-ufunc with NaN-ignoring semantics
- Add native_binary_fmax_or_passthrough/fmin helpers for kwarg fallback
- Update fnp-python fmax/fmin bindings to use native for simple cases
- Add conformance_fmax_fmin.rs harness with 16 oracle tests covering:
  - Basic arrays and NaN-ignoring behavior
  - Both-NaN returns NaN
  - Inf handling
  - Broadcasting (2D and scalar)
  - 50+ random inputs with interspersed NaNs

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
